title: vitis salutaris
intro: Vitis salutaris, also known as the 'Hog Plum' or 'Wild Plum', is a type of plant that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. Traditionally, the bark and fruit of Vitis salutaris have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vitis salutaris include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and various skin conditions, as well as its potential use in reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Vitis salutaris is often made into a tea, decoction, or tincture, and it can also be applied topically as a salve or ointment to treat skin issues.
